fix_attempts.description: Enhanced textDocument/implementation for bi-directional .fs <-> .fsi navigation using symbol.SignatureLocation / symbol.ImplementationLocation
Updated v0.84.0 changelog — 18 entries since v0.83.0 — supersedes #1465
Fix type-forwarded type decompilation: check ParentModule vs MainModule, redirect decompiler to actual defining assembly
Resolve implementation assembly (Roslyn-style path lookup) before decompiling to fix throw null in reference assemblies
Skip unreadable files (SourceLinked paths) in rename handler; remove duplicate log in textDocument/implementation

notes: Mar 2026 run (22857458477): Task3: pushed update to PR #1483 (FCS 43.10.101 has the fix for #1362); commented on #1362 noting upstream fix is in FCS 43.10.101. Task10: implemented .fsi<->.fs navigation for textDocument/implementation (#1473) — new PR created from branch repo-assist/feature-1473-go-to-signature-file-20260308. Also: PR #1492 = type forwarder decompile fix, PR #1493 = changelog v0.84.0. Regression tests PRs: #1482 (RemoveRedundantQualifier), #1483 (parens in chained call), #1484 (FSAC0002 nullable join). Open Repo Assist PRs: #1465, #1482, #1483, #1484, #1490, #1491, #1492, #1493 + new #1473 feature PR.
